name: Andrew Crawford // Valentine’s Day 1
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Being popular must be tough on Valentine’s Day. A bunch of random girls just confessing their feelings to you as if they’ve known you forever.

With so many options who do you pick? Maybe try to open your eyes and realize your best friend isn’t such a bad option.

_____________________________

First Valentine’s Day alt yay

I must confess, this is the only one I have finished. I have no ideas for the other two.. oops. I’m sure I’ll get there soon enough

Feeling a little under the weather rn so I’m not sure how well I’ll be able to work on the other two bots.. Thankfully they’re alts so it’s just the initial message I gotta do, but I’m just warning you guys

Also I’ve lowkey been wanting to like change the format of my description and bot personality 🤔 what do you guys think or recommend
